display.purpose: Greeting on Home page only. Inter 600, ember <em>.

headline.purpose: Section titles, preceded by mono numeral eyebrow.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase tracked: eyebrows, kbd, status timestamps, hero-card units, every numeric readout.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Resting card. Inset highlight + ambient drop.

shadows.name: shadow-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover card. Deeper drop + ember-soft outer ring.

shadows.name: shadow-popover
shadows.purpose: Search results popover and similar floating panels.

shadows.name: brand-mark-glow
shadows.value: 0 6px 14px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.73 0.14 50) 40%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .2)
shadows.purpose: Brand mark in topbar — the only ember-glowing surface.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Card lift, hover transitions. Ease-out-quart-ish, no overshoot.

motion.name: pulse-status
motion.purpose: status-up dot heartbeat. The system's only ambient animation.

components.name: Quicklinks Card
components.description: Signature component. Icon + title-with-status-dot + mono description + corner arrow. Lifts and warms title to ember on hover.
components.html: Plexmedia · 192.168.1.40:32400
components.css: .ds-qlinks-card { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 13px 14px; background: oklch(0.235 0.014 50); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); border-radius: 10px; color: oklch(0.95 0.01 60); text-decoration: none; height: 68px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .04) inset, 0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / .28); transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1), box-shadow 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-qlinks-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: oklch(0.32 0.012 50); background: oklch(0.275 0.016 50); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .06) inset, 0 14px 36px oklch(0 0 0 / .38), 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.73 0.14 50 / 0.14); } .ds-qlinks-card:hover .ds-qlinks-title { color: oklch(0.80 0.15 55); } .ds-qlinks-card:hover .ds-qlinks-arrow { opacity: 1; transform: translate(2px, -2px); } .ds-qlinks-ico { width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 8px; display: grid; place-items: center; flex: 0 0 auto; background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.04); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); color: oklch(0.95 0.01 60); padding: 6px; } .ds-qlinks-ico svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .ds-qlinks-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-qlinks-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px; letter-spacing: -0.005em; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: color 160ms; } .ds-qlinks-desc { color: oklch(0.55 0.01 55); font-size: 11.5px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.01em; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-status-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-status-dot.ds-up { background: oklch(0.74 0.15 145); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.74 0.15 145) 60%, transparent); animation: ds-pulse 2.6s ease-out infinite; } .ds-qlinks-arrow { position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; color: oklch(0.55 0.01 55); opacity: 0; transition: 180ms ease; } .ds-qlinks-arrow svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.74 0.15 145) 70%, transparent); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px transparent; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: 36×36 chrome button. ink-dim glyph, no fill. Hovers to ink + bg-card-hi. Used in topbar.
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 9px; background: oklch(0.235 0.014 50); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); color: oklch(0.72 0.01 55); display: grid; place-items: center; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: 140ms ease; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { color: oklch(0.95 0.01 60); border-color: oklch(0.32 0.012 50); background: oklch(0.275 0.016 50); } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.73 0.14 50); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-icon-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

components.name: Nav Pill
components.description: Top-bar nav link. The only chrome that warms to ember-hi on hover.
components.html: HOME
components.css: .ds-nav-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 0 10px; height: 36px; background: oklch(0.235 0.014 50); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); border-radius: 9px; color: oklch(0.72 0.01 55); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: 140ms ease; } .ds-nav-pill:hover { color: oklch(0.80 0.15 55); border-color: oklch(0.32 0.012 50); background: oklch(0.275 0.016 50); } .ds-nav-pill svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

components.name: Search Bar
components.description: Page-wide search input with mono kbd hint. Ember focus halo.
components.html: ⌘K
components.css: .ds-searchbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: oklch(0.235 0.014 50); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .04) inset, 0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / .28); transition: 160ms ease; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-searchbar:focus-within { border-color: oklch(0.73 0.14 50); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .04) inset, 0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / .28), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.73 0.14 50 / 0.14); } .ds-searchbar .ds-q { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: oklch(0.55 0.01 55); flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-searchbar input { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: 0; outline: 0; color: oklch(0.95 0.01 60); font: inherit; font-size: 15px; padding: 4px 0; } .ds-searchbar input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.55 0.01 55); } .ds-kbd { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.55 0.01 55); padding: 3px 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); border-radius: 5px; background: oklch(0.19 0.01 50); }

components.name: Statusbar Pill
components.description: Compact mono pill with pulsing status dot. Ambient system heartbeat.
components.css: .ds-statusbar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; background: oklch(0.235 0.014 50); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); border-radius: 9px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(0.72 0.01 55); letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-statusbar b { color: oklch(0.95 0.01 60); font-weight: 600; } .ds-statusbar .ds-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.74 0.15 145); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.74 0.15 145) 60%, transparent); animation: ds-statusbar-pulse 2.6s ease-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-statusbar-pulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.74 0.15 145) 70%, transparent); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px transparent; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } }

components.name: Section Head
components.description: Numeric eyebrow + Inter title left, mono meta right, hairline rule beneath. Used everywhere a content section opens.
components.html:
02 /

Services

14 ONLINE · manage
components.css: .ds-section-head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 14px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-section-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-numeral { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(0.73 0.14 50); letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-section-title h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: oklch(0.95 0.01 60); } .ds-section-meta { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(0.55 0.01 55); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-section-meta a { color: oklch(0.80 0.15 55); text-decoration: none; } .ds-section-meta a:hover { color: oklch(0.73 0.14 50); }

components.name: Hero Stat Card
components.description: Glance metric tile. Ember-soft icon well + mono value + mono uppercase label. Home page only.

components.css: .ds-hero-card { background: oklch(0.235 0.014 50); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 50 / 0.6); border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-hero-card .ds-val { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.95 0.01 60); } .ds-hero-card .ds-lab { font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.55 0.01 55); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-hero-card .ds-ico { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(0.73 0.14 50 / 0.14); color: oklch(0.80 0.15 55); display: grid; place-items: center; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-hero-card .ds-ico svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

narrative.overview:
A private operations console, not a product. One operator (the homeowner) sits at it after dark to glance at Plex queues, NAS pools, Homey zones, Docker stacks, and a wall of bookmarked services. The aesthetic is a warm-graphite workshop lit by a single banked ember, not a glassy SaaS dashboard, not a neon ops center, not the macOS native vocabulary. Surfaces are dim, slightly browned, never blue-grey; typography is Inter for prose, JetBrains Mono for any number, label, or technical readout. Every accent is the same copper-ember hue, used sparingly enough that lighting it up means something.

Density matters here. The user can flip a global density switch and a per-page variant attribute; the system must respect both without re-theming. The grid prefers many small calm cells over few large dramatic ones. Read time is measured in seconds, not minutes.

What this system explicitly rejects: cobalt-blue developer-tool palettes, neon cyberpunk overlays, pure black backgrounds, decorative glassmorphism, identical icon-heading-text card grids, gradient text as default emphasis, side-stripe accent borders, and anything that reads as AI-generated SaaS landing page.
keyCharacteristics: Warm graphite (chroma 0.01–0.016, hue 50–60) underneath, never neutral grey, never blue-shifted.
A single ember accent across every page; semantic-only sage/steel/alarm for state.
Mono font carries the technical voice: counters, labels, status text, eyebrows.
Cards are uniform, low-shadow, hover lifts 2px and warms by one chroma step.
Section heads use a numeric eyebrow (02 /) plus a hairline rule, never a solid bar.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Ember is the only decorative color. Sage, steel, and alarm are reserved for semantic state and data viz. Adding a fourth decorative hue is the single fastest way to break the system.

rules.name: The Warm Graphite Rule
rules.body: No background, border, or text color may have hue outside the 50–60 range. Hue 230 (steel) is permitted only inside a data-viz frame; hue 145 / 85 / 28 (status) only when bound to a live system state.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: --bg is oklch(0.19 0.01 50), never #000. Even the deepest scrollbar track keeps a chroma of 0.01.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Inter for prose and chrome, JetBrains Mono for any value, identifier, label, status timestamp, or technical readout.

rules.name: The Tracked-Mono Rule
rules.body: Mono is always tracked open (letter-spacing 0.08–0.14em) and usually uppercased. Tight or mixed-case mono in a label slot reads as a bug.

rules.name: The No-Italic Rule
rules.body: <em> is reserved for ember-colored emphasis at display scale; it is never rendered italic. Other italics are forbidden.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Touch Rule
rules.body: Cards rest flat-with-shadow, and they lift translateY(-2px) plus the ember-soft ring on hover. The transition is 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1). No bounce, no scale, no glow without contact.

rules.name: The Inset Highlight Rule
rules.body: Every elevated surface includes the 1px inset white-04 stroke at the top edge. It's what reads the surface as lit from above, not stuck onto the page.

dos: Do keep every neutral inside hue 50–60 with chroma 0.01–0.016. Warm graphite, never blue-grey, never neutral.
Do use ember as the single decorative voice. If a screen feels flat, lift one element with ember-hi text on hover, not a second accent color.
Do set every number, label, identifier, status timestamp, and eyebrow in JetBrains Mono, tracked open at 0.08–0.14em.
Do wrap status pills around .status-dot and let up pulse on a 2.6s ease-out cadence. The pulse is the system's heartbeat.
Do use the inset white-04 + drop oklch(0/.28) shadow pair on every resting card, and add the ember-soft ring on hover.
Do lift cards translateY(-2px) over 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1) on hover. Same curve every time.
Do preface section titles with a mono numeral eyebrow in ember (01 /, 02 /).
Do respect both html[data-density='dense'] and body[data-variant='dense|playful'].
Do use OKLCH everywhere. The palette is computed in OKLCH; hex is a deliverable, not a source.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff. The bg floor is oklch(0.19 0.01 50), the ink ceiling is oklch(0.95 0.01 60).
Don't introduce a second decorative accent. No teals, no purples, no second oranges.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left: 3px solid …). Borders are full-perimeter, 1px, in line-soft or line.
Don't apply gradient text by default. The only sanctioned gradient text is the playful-variant greeting <em>.
Don't add glassmorphism. No backdrop-filter, no translucent panels stacked over wallpaper.
Don't ship hero-metric templates: big-gradient-number above small-label above supporting-stats.
Don't italicize text. <em> is colored, never slanted.
Don't use solid filled primary buttons. Action emphasis comes from hover-warming and lift.
Don't nest cards. A panel inside a card inside the shell is always wrong.
Don't animate layout properties (width, padding, margin). Animate transform, opacity, box-shadow, color, border-color, background.
Don't use bouncy or elastic easing. The system curve is cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1).
Don't use em dashes in copy. Commas, colons, semicolons, periods, parentheses.
